# WASSHA SACCOS

> WASSHA SACCOS is a modern Savings and Credit Cooperative Society (SACCOS) management platform serving WASSHA members. It provides member self-service savings, multi-stage loan workflows, real-time notifications and audit-grade reporting.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://wassha-saccos.lovable.app/): Landing page describing the platform.
- [Workflow guide](https://wassha-saccos.lovable.app/workflow): How a loan moves through Submitted → Under Review → Finance → Board Chair → Board Member 1 → Board Member 2 → Manager → Disbursement → Completed.
- [Sign in](https://wassha-saccos.lovable.app/auth): Member, staff and admin authentication.

## What the app does
- Members track savings, contributions, statements and loan applications.
- Approvers, finance officers, board members and managers move loans through a strict multi-stage approval workflow with audit logs.
- Administrators manage members, roles, board seats, loan policies, reports and audit trail.
- Loan types supported: Development, Chap Chap (Quick), Emergency.
- Languages: English and Kiswahili.

## Contact
Lovable preview: https://wassha-saccos.lovable.app
